summary: Frontend refactoring testing complete - ProductionTab.jsx component extraction successful. All functionality working correctly after extracting Producción tab from monolithic InventoryManager.js (~3191 lines reduced to 2823 lines). The new ProductionTab component (401 lines) is fully functional.

issues: Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Navigation to Inventario Maestro (/inventory) works correctly
Tab de Insumos - IngredientsTab component loads with data-testid='ingredients-tab'
Tab de Insumos - Displays all ingredients with proper badges (Stock bajo, Sub-receta)
Tab de Insumos - 'Producir' button visible on sub-recipe ingredients (Salsa Criolla)
Tab de Producción - ProductionTab component loads with data-testid='production-tab'
Tab de Producción - Shows 'Dashboard de Producción' header and description
Tab de Producción - Shows 'PRODUCCIÓN URGENTE' section with Salsa Criolla (5.0/10 lt)
Tab de Producción - 'Producir Ahora' button opens production dialog
Tab de Producción - Production dialog shows sub-recipe info, quantity, warehouse select
Tab de Producción - 'Verificar' button checks ingredient availability and shows result
Tab de Producción - Check result shows 'Disponible para producir' with cost (RD$137.50)
Tab de Producción - 'Ver Historial' button loads production history (1 item found)
Tab de Producción - Production history displays recent production records
Tab de Almacenes - Shows 2 warehouses (Almacen Principal, Barra) with 'Nuevo Almacén' button
Tab de Proveedores - Shows 3 suppliers (Distribuidora Nacional, Mariscos del Caribe, Bebidas Nacionales SRL)
Producir button in Insumos tab navigates to Production tab via onNavigateToProduction
action_items: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components to fix accessibility warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ProductionTab.jsx properly extracts all production-related state and handlers from parent
Props interface is clean: ingredients, warehouses, getTotalStock, onRefreshAll
Component calculates subrecipesNeedingProduction from ingredients.filter(ing => ing.is_subrecipe)
Production dialog workflow: handleOpenProduction → handleCheckProduction → handleProduce
All data-testid attributes properly maintained for testing: production-tab, load-history-btn, urgent-item-{id}, ok-item-{id}, etc.
IngredientsTab uses onNavigateToProduction instead of onOpenProduction for proper navigation to Production tab

features_tested: PRODUCCIÓN URGENTE section with sub-recipes needing production
STOCK ADECUADO section with sub-recipes with sufficient stock
No sub-recipes message when none configured
Producir Ahora button opens production dialog
Ver Historial button loads production history
Production dialog with quantity, warehouse select, notes
Check result shows availability and production cost
onNavigateToProduction callback navigates to Production tab

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring verified - ProductionTab.jsx successfully extracted from InventoryManager.js. The component handles all production dashboard functionality including sub-recipe production, verification, and history. IngredientsTab now uses onNavigateToProduction prop to navigate to Production tab when 'Producir' button is clicked. All 10 tabs in the inventory page are functional. Parent component properly passes required props and callbacks to child components.

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
